tasks.subject: Task 0: Phase 0 — Pre-flight Checks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture bucket versioning state, confirm upload daemon running, snapshot quarantine prefix, back up the source report. No code changes.

**Files:** none (operational artifacts only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Bucket versioning state recorded in the operator log
- Upload daemon confirmed running
- quarantine_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.txt uploaded to gs://{bucket}/remediation/
- corrected_report.json copied to gs://{bucket}/remediation/2026-04-19_corrected_report.json

**Verify:** `gcloud storage ls gs://$BUCKET/remediation/`

**Steps:** 6 (set env, check versioning, confirm daemon, snapshot quarantine, backup report, verify artifacts). See plan Task 0 for full commands.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gcloud storage ls gs://$BUCKET/remediation/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bucket versioning state recorded", "upload daemon confirmed running", "quarantine snapshot uploaded to GCS", "source report backed up to GCS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add --include-ids Flag to Audit Tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add CLI flag `--include-ids {CSV | path/to/ids.txt}` to tools/gcs_archive_audit.py. Used by every subsequent verification task.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/gcs_archive_audit.py
- Modify: tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- test_load_include_ids_from_csv_string passes
- test_load_include_ids_from_file passes
- test_load_include_ids_returns_none_when_no_spec passes
- test_audit_skips_non_matching_ids passes (mocked gcloud)
- test_include_ids_combined_with_resume passes
- Existing tests still pass

**Verify:** `pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v`

**Steps:** TDD — write failing tests in new TestIncludeIds class, implement `_load_include_ids` helper, add argparse flag, wire loop-level filter in main, run tests, commit EN+FR. See plan Task 1 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gcs_archive_audit.py", "tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 new TestIncludeIds tests pass", "all existing tests still pass", "one commit landed (EN+FR)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Phase 2.0 + 2.1 — Investigate and Fix Classifier
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm three hypothesized classifier bugs against real archives, then apply the three fixes TDD-style.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/gcs_archive_audit.py
- Modify: tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py
- Upload: gs://{bucket}/remediation/phase2_investigation_YYYY-MM-DD.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Investigation notes uploaded for 3487, 4398, 2754/5441
- 5 new TestClassifierBugFixes tests pass
- Existing test_row_count_mismatch still passes
- secondary_tags propagate from details into entry in main

**Verify:** `pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v`

**Steps:** 13 (investigate 3 archives, upload notes, write 5 failing tests, modify inspect_archive signature+logic, thread row_count_tolerance through _inspect_one, add --row-count-tolerance CLI flag, propagate secondary_tags in main, run tests, commit EN+FR). See plan Task 2 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gcs_archive_audit.py", "tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["investigation notes uploaded to GCS", "5 new TestClassifierBugFixes tests pass", "existing test_row_count_mismatch still passes", "one commit landed (EN+FR)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Phase 1A — Upload Pending Locals and Verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Let the upload daemon process the 10 pending .tar.gz files in crawler_archives/ and verify each lands OK using the corrected classifier.

**Files:** none (operational artifacts only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Pre-upload sanity check run on all 10 locals
- All passing locals uploaded (daemon log 'Upload successful')
- Targeted audit shows all OK; any failures rolled back to crawls-quarantine-rejected/
- phase1a_verification_YYYY-MM-DD.json uploaded to gs://{bucket}/remediation/

**Verify:** inspect phase1a_verification.json categories

**Steps:** 7 (sanity each local, wait for daemon, verify uploads landed, run targeted audit, inspect result, rollback failures, upload verification). See plan Task 3 for full commands.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('phase1a_verification.json')); print(set(a['category'] for a in d['archives']))\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sanity pre-check run on all 10 locals", "all passing locals uploaded", "targeted audit shows all OK", "verification JSON uploaded to GCS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Phase 1B — Delete Two Safe Duplicate .tmp Archives
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete gs://{bucket}/crawls-quarantine/4365.tmp.tar.gz and 5934.tmp.tar.gz after confirming each main counterpart still classifies OK.

**Files:** none (operational artifacts only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Preflight re-audit confirms 4365 and 5934 mains are OK
- Both .tmp.tar.gz objects deleted
- gcloud ls shows 'not found' for both
- phase1b_preflight.json + phase1b_log_YYYY-MM-DD.md uploaded to GCS

**Verify:** `for id in 4365 5934; do gcloud storage ls gs://$BUCKET/crawls-quarantine/$id.tmp.tar.gz 2>&1 | grep -q not.found && echo $id gone; done`

**Steps:** 5 (pre-delete ls both, re-audit mains with --include-ids, delete the 2 tmps, verify gone, upload artifacts). See plan Task 4 for full commands.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "for id in 4365 5934; do gcloud storage ls gs://$BUCKET/crawls-quarantine/$id.tmp.tar.gz 2>&1 | grep -q 'not found\\|One or more URLs' && echo $id gone; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight re-audit shows both mains OK", "both .tmp.tar.gz removed", "verify both now return not-found", "preflight JSON + operator log uploaded to GCS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Phase 1C — Build and Upload Update-Mode Queue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement tools/build_update_mode_queue.py (TDD) + run it to produce and upload gs://{bucket}/remediation/update_mode_queue_YYYY-MM-DD.json.

**Files:**
- Create: tools/build_update_mode_queue.py
- Create: tools/tests/test_build_update_mode_queue.py
- Upload: gs://{bucket}/remediation/update_mode_queue_YYYY-MM-DD.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 10 tests pass in TestClassifyEntry (corrupted→entries, major→entries, minor→deferred, excess→deferred, expected_zero→deferred, tmp_sibling_row_mismatch→deferred, ok→skipped, wrong_name→skipped, exclude_ids filters, threshold_override)
- Queue generated against real corrected_report.json has ~23 entries and ~50 deferred
- Queue uploaded to GCS

**Verify:** `pytest tools/tests/test_build_update_mode_queue.py -v`

**Steps:** 8 (write 10 failing tests, implement script, run tests, commit EN+FR, generate real queue with --exclude-ids from #3 survivors, sanity-check output, upload to GCS, hand URI to ops). See plan Task 5 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/build_update_mode_queue.py", "tools/tests/test_build_update_mode_queue.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/tests/test_build_update_mode_queue.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10 tests pass in TestClassifyEntry", "one commit landed (EN+FR)", "queue JSON generated with ~23 entries", "queue uploaded to gs://{bucket}/remediation/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Phase 2.2 + 2.3 — Re-audit Quarantine and Surgically Restore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-audit crawls-quarantine/ with the corrected classifier, implement tools/restore_from_reaudit.py (TDD), execute restore, file middle-bucket follow-up ticket.

**Files:**
- Create: tools/restore_from_reaudit.py
- Create: tools/tests/test_restore_from_reaudit.py
- Upload: gs://{bucket}/remediation/quarantine_reaudit_YYYY-MM-DD.json
- Upload: gs://{bucket}/remediation/phase2_restore_log_YYYY-MM-DD.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Re-audit JSON uploaded with ~47 reclassifications to OK (35 drift + 7 excess + 5 expected=0)
- 5 tests pass in TestRestore
- Dry-run log reviewed before real run
- Real restore moves reclassified-OK archives with no collision
- Restore log uploaded to GCS
- Middle-bucket follow-up ticket filed with URL recorded in log

**Verify:** `pytest tools/tests/test_restore_from_reaudit.py -v`

**Steps:** 14 (re-audit, inspect counts, upload re-audit, write 5 failing tests, implement restore, run tests, commit EN+FR, dry-run, review, execute real, verify restores landed, upload logs, file follow-up ticket, mark complete). See plan Task 6 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/restore_from_reaudit.py", "tools/tests/test_restore_from_reaudit.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tools/tests/test_restore_from_reaudit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["re-audit JSON uploaded with ~47 OK reclassifications", "5 tests pass in TestRestore", "one commit landed (EN+FR)", "dry-run log reviewed", "real restore executed and log uploaded", "follow-up ticket filed for middle bucket"]}
```

notes: All 7 plan tasks completed. Commits: 0dcc13ec (spec), d15ad839 (plan), a25ac52e (Task 1: --include-ids + incidental --resume fix), 00a94243 (Task 2: classifier tags), 62204454 (Task 5: build_update_mode_queue.py), e7d49a3c (Phase 2.1.5: snapshot.urls_crawled preference — scope addition discovered during live execution), 22c54c4e (Task 6: restore_from_reaudit.py). Final state: 109 archives in crawls/, 22 redundant residue in crawls-quarantine/, 4 crawl_ids in update-mode queue (1427, 1933, 3559, 4066) at gs://{bucket}/remediation/update_mode_queue_v2_2026-04-22.json.
